## About aiseo.hamburg

**Company**: aiseo.hamburg - KI-Sichtbarkeit für Hamburger Unternehmen
**Location**: Hamburg, Germany
**Specialization**: AI SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
**Contact**: hello@aiseo.hamburg
**Phone**: +49 176 321 94 754

## Services

We help Hamburg-based businesses become visible and recommended by AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and other AI platforms.

### Core Services:
- AI Visibility Audits (KI-Sichtbarkeit Check)
- AI-Sichtbarkeits-Upgrade Hamburg (einmaliges Upgrade-Paket für 1.500€ netto)
- Full KI-Sichtbarkeit Packages (ai-sichtbarkeit-now) - Premium conversion-focused offering
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
- LLM Optimization (LLMO)
- AI-friendly content structuring
- Leistungen (full services overview)
- Local AI optimization for Hamburg businesses

### AI-Sichtbarkeits-Upgrade Hamburg:
A one-time upgrade package specifically for Hamburg businesses:
- AI visibility analysis (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI)
- Website optimization (homepage + 2 targeted subpages)
- Technical foundation (Schema markup, site structure, internal linking)
- Indexing verification via Google Search Console
- Complete documentation and explanation
- Price: 1.500€ net, Duration: 10-14 days
- No subscription, no agency commitment
- URL: https://aiseo.hamburg/ai-sichtbarkeits-upgrade-hamburg

### Expertise Areas:
- ChatGPT optimization
- Perplexity visibility
- Claude AI recommendations
- Google Gemini / AI Overviews integration
- Local business AI presence
- E-Commerce AI visibility
- Real estate AI visibility
- Handwerk / Trades AI visibility

This website contains information about:
- AI SEO best practices

- Contact information for consultations

**Content is optimized for**: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Google AI, and other AI systems
**Update Frequency**: Monthly

## Knowledge Hub (Wissen)

Educational guides and in-depth articles about AI visibility, GEO, and digital optimization:

### Core AI Visibility Guides

- **KI-Sichtbarkeit Guide**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ki-sichtbarkeit
  Complete guide on AI visibility for businesses in 2026. Covers GEO, AEO, LLMO concepts.

- **Was ist GEO?**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/was-ist-geo
  Generative Engine Optimization explained: what GEO is, how it differs from SEO and AEO, and why it matters for AI visibility in 2026.

- **AEO – Answer Engine Optimization**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/aeo-answer-engine-optimization
  Complete guide to Answer Engine Optimization for 2026. How to structure content so AI systems use it as answers.

- **LLMO – LLM Optimierung**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/llmo-llm-optimierung
  LLM Optimization explained: how to get recommended by AI language models. Strategies, signals, and implementation.

- **AI Content Strategie**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ai-content-strategie
  How to create content that AI systems want to cite. Structure, authority signals, and citability principles.

- **Technische KI-Sichtbarkeit**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/technische-ki-sichtbarkeit
  Technical requirements for AI visibility: robots.txt, llms.txt, Schema.org, semantic HTML, KI crawler access.

- **llms.txt Anleitung**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/llms-txt-anleitung
  Step-by-step guide to creating llms.txt files. How to make websites readable for AI systems, with templates and best practices.

- **E-E-A-T und KI**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/eeat-ki-sichtbarkeit
  How E-E-A-T applies differently for AI systems vs Google. Why expertise signals matter more for ChatGPT than for traditional search.

### Platform-Specific Optimization

- **Sichtbarkeit in ChatGPT**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/sichtbarkeit-in-chatgpt
  How businesses get recommended by ChatGPT. Strategies, ranking factors, and measurement.

- **ChatGPT SEO**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/chatgpt-seo
  How to optimize content for ChatGPT recommendations instead of traditional rankings.

- **Sichtbarkeit in Perplexity AI**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/sichtbarkeit-in-perplexity

- **Sichtbarkeit in Claude AI**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/sichtbarkeit-in-claude
  How businesses become visible in Claude AI. Key factors, strategies, and practical tips for Claude optimization.

- **Sichtbarkeit in Google Gemini**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/sichtbarkeit-in-gemini
  How to appear in Google Gemini and AI Overviews. 7 strategies for Gemini optimization, E-E-A-T, and Knowledge Graph.

- **Sichtbarkeit in Google AI Overviews**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ai-overviews-sichtbarkeit
  How to appear in Google's AI Overview boxes. Zero-click optimization, E-E-A-T, structured data strategies.

- **Perplexity vs ChatGPT vs Google AI**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/perplexity-vs-chatgpt-vs-google
  Platform comparison for AI optimization: how each discovers content, citation behavior, indexing speed, and where to start optimizing.

### Strategy & Measurement

- **KI-Sichtbarkeit messen**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ki-sichtbarkeit-messen
  How to measure and track AI visibility. Tools (Ahrefs Brand Radar, Semrush AI Visibility), KPIs, and dashboards.

- **KI-Content-Audit**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ki-content-audit-anleitung
  Step-by-step guide to auditing existing content for AI readiness. Scoring system, prioritization framework, and practical checklists.

- **KI-Markenwahrnehmung**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ki-markenwahrnehmung
  How LLMs form brand perception from training data, web mentions, reviews, and press. How to influence your brand's AI reputation.

- **Wettbewerber KI-Sichtbarkeit**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/wettbewerber-ki-sichtbarkeit
  Why your competitor gets customers you never see. How to analyze competitor AI visibility and close the gap.

- **Zero-Click-Zukunft**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/zero-click-zukunft
  The shift from click-based to citation-based marketing. Gartner's 50% traffic loss prediction, new KPIs, and why this is an opportunity.

- **KI-Sichtbarkeit Kosten**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/ki-sichtbarkeit-kosten
  What AI visibility costs in 2026. Transparent pricing, cost comparison, and ROI calculation. One-time upgrade from 1.500€, ongoing from 2.500€/month.

### SEO vs AI SEO

  What you really need in 2026: traditional SEO vs AI SEO compared.

  Honest review of AI SEO tools: monitoring (Ahrefs Brand Radar, Semrush AI Visibility), content optimization, technical tools, and which to avoid.

- **AIO Fails & ChatGPT Bann**: https://aiseo.hamburg/wissen/aio-fails-chatgpt-bann
  The biggest AI optimization mistakes: keyword stuffing, cloaking, spam content. Why cheap tricks lead to permanent bans from ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI.
